summary: .oxlintrc.json has triplicate `"typeAware": true` options object — config syntax error
details: {"observation": "The oxlintrc.json file contains the 'options' key three separate times, all with `typeAware: true`. This is syntactically valid JSON (last value wins) but indicates a merge/generation bug. The duplicate keys make the config harder to read and mask the intended structure.", "severity": "low", "recommendation": "Consolidate into a single options block"}

summary: No dependabot.yml found — dependency updates are manual, no automated PRs
details: {"observation": "No .github/dependabot.yml exists. With 21 packages and rapidly evolving dependencies (Effect beta, Drizzle RC, etc.), lack of automated dependency update PRs creates risk of stale deps and missed security patches.", "severity": "medium", "recommendation": "Add dependabot.yml with weekly schedule for bun/npm ecosystem"}

summary: No ADR directory exists — architectural decisions are undocumented
details: {"observation": "Despite a complex monorepo with 21 packages, multiple database backends (SQLite, PGlite, PostgreSQL, DuckDB), dual desktop runtimes (Tauri + Electron), and an Effect-based architecture, there are zero Architecture Decision Records. The AGENTS.md references 'docs/adr/' but the directory doesn't exist.", "severity": "medium", "recommendation": "Create docs/adr/ and backfill key decisions: Effect v4 adoption, SQLite→Postgres migration, Tauri+Electron dual runtime, monorepo structure"}

summary: fd tool not installed — breaks smart_find for all agents, causes cascading tool failures
details: {"observation": "Multiple agent sessions (including 7 cartographer sessions) failed with 'fd not found'. The smart_bash→smart_find rerouter also redirects simple 'ls' commands to smart_find, causing a loop. This is a systemic infrastructure issue affecting all agent productivity.", "severity": "high", "recommendation": "Install fd: brew install fd"}

summary: 4 packages have test files but no test scripts in package.json — dead test code
details: {"observation": "Four packages (enterprise, console-core, console-app, stats-core) contain test files but have no `test` script in their package.json. These tests are never executed in CI, making them dead code that can silently break. Enterprise has 2 test files, console-core has 2, console-app has 2, stats-core has 1.", "severity": "medium", "recommendation": "Either add test scripts and wire to CI, or remove unmaintained test files"}

summary: No code coverage configured for any package — zero visibility into test completeness
details: {"observation": "Across all packages with tests (opencode: ~150 files, app: 74 files, core: 56 files, ui: 6 files, desktop: 8 files, llm: 2 files), no code coverage tool is configured. Only desktop has a `test:coverage` script using bun's built-in coverage, but there are no thresholds or CI enforcement. This means there is no visibility into which code paths are tested and which are not.", "severity": "high", "recommendation": "Add coverage configuration (bun test --coverage) with thresholds (80% line, 70% branch minimum) and wire to CI with enforcement"}
